posts.author: iparr99 (Indira Parrales)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

A user accidentally deleted a document in a Files column. After doing some digging, I noticed that there is no way to restore the document. You have an undo button that is only active for 1 minute. If you miss it, that option goes away. Under the Activity log, you are able to see that the document was deleted but it is not available in the Trash to be able to restore it. It would be nice to have that capability.

What are you trying to achieve

Allow documents that were deleted to be restored.
